message:
feat(output): wire daemon commands to Output abstraction

Convert daemon start/stop/status output to use the Output abstraction
with rich_rust markup:

- Daemon start messages (foreground and background modes)
- Daemon stop success/error messages
- Daemon status display with styled headers
- Loaded models display with colored names

This is incremental progress on bd-33n. The Output abstraction now
handles these messages with proper markup that degrades gracefully
when styled output is disabled.

Remaining work:
- print_quickstart() has complex box-drawing that needs careful
  conversion
- cmd_stats() and cmd_search() output formatting
- ~277 println! calls remaining

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
